short: An AI-first code editor with inline edits, codebase chat, and an agent mode.
definition: Cursor is an AI-first code editor from Anysphere, built as a fork of Visual Studio Code. It integrates large language models from several providers directly into the editing workflow, offering inline completions, a chat interface with codebase context, multi-file refactoring from natural-language instructions, and an agent mode that plans and executes multi-step coding tasks. It is one of the prominent AI-native developer tools.
